title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird founded Koah Labs, an ad monetization platform for AI tools, raising $26M. He argues that subscriptions have failed for AI applications and that ads will drive adoption, while the real bottleneck for AI agents is human trust rather than technology.
